title: Niva Bupa is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Niva Bupa is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Niva Bupa in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Niva Bupa:
Niva Bupa is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa!
